creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have looked at the submitted port files and it satisfies the requirements for a FreeBSD port and it builds, packages and installs just fine, but I'm not going to commit it at this time!

The sources seem to have been ported from DOS and contain a lot of code that looks questionable to me (e.g. the whole scan code parsing).

And a game needing privileges (installed as SUID binary by default!) seems to be a very bad idea from a security point of view.
